title: Set of 3 LAV LAL 480ml Glass Tumbler
description: Pack of 3 Tall Lav Drinking Glass - Elegant Design and Versatile Use Key Features: Elegant Design: The Tall Lav Drinking Glass features a sleek and sophisticated design, adding a touch of elegance to any table setting. Its tall and slim profile gives it a modern look that complements any decor style. Versatile Use: These glasses are suitable for various beverages, including water, juice, cocktails, and more. Whether you're hosting a dinner party, enjoying a relaxing drink after work, or celebrating a special occasion, these glasses are perfect for all occasions. Gift-Worthy: This pack of 3 glasses makes for a thoughtful housewarming gift, birthday present, or wedding gift. It's a unique and practical choice that will add a special touch to someone's new home or celebratory event. Dimensions and Capacity: Each glass has a height of 14.5cm and a diameter of 6cm. With a generous capacity of 48cl, these glasses can hold a substantial amount of your favorite beverage. Clear Color: The glasses are transparent and crystal clear, allowing the vibrant colors of your drinks to shine through. The clear color also adds a timeless and classic aesthetic to your table setting. Product Specifications: Quantity: Pack of 3 Glass Type: Tall Drinking Glass Dimensions: Height 14.5cm, Diameter 6cm Capacity: 48cl Color: Clear Make a statement with our Pack of 3 Tall Lav Drinking Glass. Its elegant design, versatile use, and generous capacity make it the perfect addition to any home or a special gift for your loved ones. Order now and elevate your drinking experience with these stylish and functional glasses.
